violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed drinking/using open beverage container outside of designated area. Observed personal beverages in working area.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed mixer and mixer stand need to be cleaned.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Observed hand sink in Meat Department was full of cups and pitchers.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
